title: Parassala Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Parassala Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Parassala Sree Mahadeva temple is one of the foremost centres of worship in south Kerala and the temple is situated at the tiny village of Parassala adjoining the Kerala - Tamil Na
overview.description: Parassala Sree Mahadeva temple is one of the foremost centres of worship in south Kerala and the temple is situated at the tiny village of Parassala adjoining the Kerala - Tamil Nadu boundary. Here the deity, Lord Siva is facing the west, which is considered as a rare phenomenon, and devotees even from far off places attend the worship. It was built by Mallen Chembakaraman Delava of Venad royal family. Parvathy devi in this temple is facing East towards the backside.

topPlaces.name: Parassala
topPlaces.description: Parassala is a small town in Neyyatinkara taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in Kerala, India. It is situated 29 km south east of state capital Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, bordering Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Parasala
topPlaces.description: Parasala is a small village in Jodhpur of, Rajasthan state, India.

topPlaces.name: Kaliyakkavilai
topPlaces.description: Kaliyakkavilai is a town panchayat in Kanyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, close to the Tamil Nadu-Kerala border. It lies on the Kochi-Thiruvananthapuram-Kanyakumari National Highway 47.

topPlaces.name: Manjalumoodu
topPlaces.description: Manjalumoodu is a village in the Kanniyakumari district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Parasuvaikkal
topPlaces.description: Parasuvaikkal is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. Parasuvaikkal has four Hindu temples, Parasuvaikkal major Sree Bhagavathy temple governed by Travancore Devaswom Board, Ponnamkulam Devi Kshethram, Idanatukonam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple and Kottakkakam Sree Mahadeva Kshethram Trust.

topPlaces.name: Choozhal
topPlaces.description: Choozhal is a village in Tamil Nadu located nearly 60 kilometres (37 mi) from Kanyakumari and 40 kilometres (25 mi) from Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala. It is on the border between Tamil Nadu and Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Padanthalumoodu
topPlaces.description: Padanthalumoodu is located in Kanyakumari District of Tamil Nadu. The area of Padanthalumoodu lies in the taluk of Vilavancode and has a Sub Post Office.

topPlaces.name: Arayoor Sree Mahadevar
topPlaces.description: Arayoor Major Sree Mahadevar Temple (ആറയൂർ ശ്രീ മഹാദേവർ) is one of the major worship places in Arayoor in Thiruvananthapuram district, Kerala, very close to Tamil Nadu border. It is a Shiva temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Parassala Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Parassala Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Parassala Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (30 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (28 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Parassala Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Parassala Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Parassala Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Parassala Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Parassala Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Parassala, Parasala, Kaliyakkavilai, Manjalumoodu, Parasuvaikkal.
